(a) The commission or the commission’s authorized representative shall hold a public hearing before approving any financial assistance under this subchapter, except as provided by Section 21.1115 (Emergency Loan or Grant) .

(b) The commission shall give each interested party an opportunity to be heard at the hearing.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.111 — Public Hearing

(a) The commission or the commission’s authorized representative shall hold a public hearing before approving any financial assistance under this subchapter, except as provided by Section 21.1115 (Emergency Loan or Grant) .

(b) The commission shall give each interested party an opportunity to be heard at the hearing.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.03(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The commission or the commission’s authorized representative shall hold a public hearing before approving any financial assistance under this subchapter, except as provided by Section 21.1115 (Emergency Loan or Grant) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The commission shall give each interested party an opportunity to be heard at the hearing.
